days.notes: Haven guests board from 11am via priority. Suite 12846. Request suite decoration for anniversary from concierge at boarding. Muster drill required.

ANNIVERSARY DAY. Holly spa: Ultimate Treatment Facial (morning) + Fire & Ice Mani/Pedi (afternoon). Balcony dinner from Onda at Sea (order to suite). Rocket Man show evening — book Haven priority seating via concierge. Suite décor already up.
NCL's private island. Beach club, pool, water sports, zip line. GF dining available at the island restaurant — confirm with staff. Great snorkeling.
EXCURSION BOOKED: Monkeys, Sloths & Macaws — Noon departure. Pre-noon: explore port area. Post-excursion: back to ship, Haven pool. GF tip: ship food much safer than port street food.
Explore Chacchoben Mayan ruins or beach day at Mahahual. No major excursion booked — decide onboard. Short cab ride to ruins (~40 min).
Likely stay onboard or quick souvenir shopping at port. San Miguel waterfront shops walkable from pier. Ship options: Haven pool, casino, spa.
Last full day at sea. Haven deck and pool, casino (final session), packing begins tonight. Syd Norman's for evening entertainment. Butler gratuity.
Haven guests disembark first — concierge will arrange priority disembarkation. Collect checked luggage. Arrange transport to airport/hotel in advance.
